prompt:
[JC:SYSTEM SCOPE]
You are the [JC:Technical Spec Agent] specifying Configuration Parameters for Sub-Phase 5.4.

GOVERNING CONSTRAINTS (apply without exception):
(none)

Produce [JC:Configuration Parameters] for each Component — externally configurable settings with types, defaults, and descriptions.

REQUIRED OUTPUT: A JSON object matching the `configuration_parameters` schema:
- params: array, each with:
  - component_id
  - name: parameter name (e.g., "database_url", "max_retries")
  - type: parameter type (string, integer, boolean, float, duration, url)
  - default: default value (null if required with no default)
  - required: boolean
  - description: human-readable description of what this parameter controls

Rules:
- Every Component should have at least connection/initialization parameters
- Security-sensitive parameters (passwords, keys) must be marked as required with no default
- Use concrete types, not "any" or "object"

CONTEXT:
Component Model: PROJECT TYPE: Consumer Discovery MVP (Phase 1 Focus): Implementation focused exclusively on Pillar 1 (Home Real Property Assistant) to prioritize user acquisition, property data ingestion (images, 3D splats), and service provider matching for individual homeowners.
Capabilities: Property Asset Ingestion (Images & 3D Splats); AI Agent Service Provider Search & Matching; Bid Estimate Comparison UI (Good-Better-Best); CC&R & Bylaws AI Extraction Module; Action Items Workflow Management (System of Action); Statutory Deadline Tracking & Alert Engine; Mass Email/SMS Communication Channel; Mobile App Client (Offline Queueing); Multi-tenant Security & Authorization (RLS); Payment Processing Integration (Stripe/Square); High-Performance Bun API Backend; SvelteKit Frontend Portal; DBOS Versioned Workflow Engine; Media Asset Storage (SeaweedFS); Regulatory Rules Engine (Notice Requirements)
Excluded: Pillar 2 (Financials) implementation for this MVP; Pillar 3 (Accounting) implementation for this MVP; Enterprise Governance MVP features (Phase 3 Focus); Field Service Engine MVP features (Phase 2 Focus); Automated Homeowner Association (HOA) Voting modules (Phase 3); Full offline-first capabilities for Homeowners (Secondary priority); Legacy Vantaca integration for V1 (Replicate 'System of Action' only); Advanced AI extraction beyond CC&Rs/Bylaws for V1; Direct Contractor Portal Access for V1; Real-time Bid Aggregation for non-homeowners

7 Components:
  cmp-prop-data: Property Data Manager (domain: property-data-management)
    Responsibilities:
    RSP-001: Accept and validate property image and 3D asset data uploads including format rejection logic.
    RSP-002: Index valid assets within 10 seconds post-upload for search systems.
    RSP-003: Manage offline data capture and synchronization buffers for mobile capture contexts.
    Dependencies: cmp-security (reads)
  cmp-provider-match: Service Provider Matcher (domain: service-provider-matching)
    Responsibilities:
    RSP-004: Return service provider search results with relevance scores using AI Agent processing.
    RSP-005: Render bid estimate comparison tables ensuring minimum bid entry thresholds.
    Dependencies: cmp-security (reads)
  cmp-compliance: Compliance Rules Engine (domain: compliance-rules-engine)
    Responsibilities:
    RSP-006: Extract and validate CC&R and Bylaws clauses using AI confidence scoring.
    RSP-007: Monitor statutory deadlines for regulatory obligations.
    RSP-008: Generate compliance notification payloads for regulatory alerts.
    Dependencies: cmp-notifications (calls)
  cmp-workflow: Action Workflow Orchestrator (domain: action-workflow-orchestrator)
    Responsibilities:
    RSP-009: Manage service action item workflow states and record audit log transitions.
    RSP-010: Reflect status updates immediately in the UI for workflow progress.
    Dependencies: cmp-security (reads), cmp-notifications (calls)
  cmp-notifications: Notification Dispatcher (domain: notification-dispatcher)
    Responsibilities:
    RSP-011: Process mass email/SMS batches for recipient lists and track delivery status.
    RSP-012: Resume delivery attempts within 2 hours upon network reconnection.
    RSP-013: Confirm receipt of messages for bounce rate tracking.
    Dependencies: cmp-security (reads)
  cmp-security: Tenant Security Gateway (domain: tenant-security-gateway)
    Responsibilities:
    RSP-014: Enforce multi-tenant security and Row-Level Security for data access.
    RSP-015: Return unauthorized access responses within 50ms for restricted tenant data.
    Dependencies: none
  cmp-payment: Payment Transaction Processor (domain: payment-transaction-processor)
    Responsibilities:
    RSP-016: Process payment requests for deposits and service fees via integrated payment gateway.
    RSP-017: Generate electronic proof of payment and receipt documents.
    Dependencies: cmp-notifications (calls)
Data Models: Component cmp-prop-data:
  PropertyAsset: asset_id:string, property_identifier:string, asset_type:string, ingested_at:timestamp, status:string
  MediaManifest: media_manifest_id:string, asset_id:string, file_format:string, storage_path:string, file_size_bytes:integer
  OfflineBuffer: buffer_id:string, asset_id:string, capture_timestamp:timestamp, sync_status:string, retry_count:integer
Component cmp-provider-match:
  ProviderProfile: provider_id:string, business_name:string, location:string, match_score:float, is_home_real_property:boolean, accessed_at:timestamp
  BidEstimate: estimate_id:string, provider_id:string, property_identifier:string, bid_amount_cents:integer, submission_timestamp:timestamp
Component cmp-compliance:
  BylawsClause: clause_id:string, source_doc_reference:string, extracted_text:string, extraction_confidence:float, created_at:timestamp
  StatutoryDeadline: deadline_id:string, jurisdiction:string, obligation_type:string, deadline_date:timestamp
  NoticeRequirement: notice_requirement_id:string, jurisdiction:string, content_template:string, is_active:boolean
Component cmp-workflow:
  ActionItem: action_item_id:string, task_description:string, workflow_status:string, assigned_at:timestamp
  TransitionLog: log_id:string, action_item_id:string, prev_status:string, new_status:string, transition_timestamp:timestamp
Component cmp-notifications:
  MessageBatch: batch_id:string, channel_type:string, payload_hash:string, status:string, created_at:timestamp
  DeliveryAttempt: attempt_id:string, batch_id:string, recipient_identifier:string, delivery_status:string, bounce_status:string, retry_count:integer
  RecipientList: list_id:string, batch_id:string, tenant_member_id:string
Component cmp-security:
  RLSPolicy: policy_id:string, tenant_id:string, scope:string, is_active:boolean
  TenantBoundary: boundary_id:string, tenant_id:string, accessible_scope:string, access_level:string
Component cmp-payment:
  PaymentIntent: intent_id:string, amount_cents:integer, currency:string, gateway_reference:string, status:string, created_at:timestamp
  ReceiptDocument: receipt_id:string, intent_id:string, document_url:string, generated_at:timestamp
  DepositFee: fee_id:string, intent_id:string, fee_amount_cents:integer, fee_type:string, processed_at:timestamp
